head.text: Occipital pain, with nausea on rising, followed by vomiting. Influenza, with aching pains all over, and heat in the limbs. Ozæna; frontal pain

stomach_abdomen.text: Loathing of food; nausea on rising, followed by vomiting and cramps. Stools watery, frothy

extremities.text: Stiffness of all joints; calves numb; aching in bones. Rheumatic pain in back. Pains in limbs

skin.text: Itching welts. Urticaria from gastric derangement

keynotes.text: color="#800000">TRIOSTEUM PERFOLIATUM Fever-root Triosteum is a very valuable remedy in diarrhœa attended with colicky pains and nausea, numbness of lower limbs after stool, and increased flow of urine; also in influenza. Quiets nervous symptoms (Coffea, Hyos). Biliousness. Bilious colic.
